triggers.prompt_regex: \b(grep|semantic grep|memory grep|mgrep|search files|search code|find exact|regex search|literal match|find symbol|search memory records)\b

context.directive: Use grep for bounded exact local file search, semantic_grep for ranked file/code neighborhoods, memory_grep for Data API memory records, and mgrep when the user asks for multi-source code, memory, web, docs, or API search.
workflow: Prefer exact grep for symbols, error strings, filenames, config keys, and log lines.
Use semantic_grep when the user describes behavior, intent, or concepts rather than exact text.
Use memory_grep only through the Data API so tenant, repo, path, tag, source, room, status, and validity constraints remain auditable.
Use mgrep source=all only when the user explicitly wants multiple source classes, and report degraded sources separately.
validation_defaults: MCP tools/list includes grep, semantic_grep, memory_grep, and mgrep.
grep returns bounded local matches with file, line, symbol, and context.
memory_grep degrades with remote_unavailable when native MCP is not configured.
